QUANTANIUM.notes: Volatile! Must refine within 15 minutes or it explodes.

SADARYX.notes: Mission-only. Found at Rock Cracker in Nyx.

HATHOR_ABE.notes: PVP cave mining location on Aberdeen. Yields rare gems (Jaclium, Saldynium, Carinite, Carinite Pure).

HATHOR_DAY.notes: PVP cave mining location on Daymar. Yields rare gems (Jaclium, Saldynium, Carinite, Carinite Pure).

NYX_KEEGER.notes: Asteroid belt between Glaciem Ring and the system edge

ROCK_CRACKER.notes: Mission-gated mobile mining platform. Not a fixed location.

prospector.name: MISC Prospector
prospector.notes: Entry mining ship. Single S1 laser, 1 operator.

mole.name: Argo MOLE
mole.notes: Multi-crew mining. 3 S2 turrets. Modifiers stack across turrets firing same rock. Solo: use one turret at a time.

golem.name: Drake Golem
golem.notes: Solo mining. Bespoke laser (cannot be swapped), 2 module slots. Limited to smaller rocks.

orion.name: RSI Orion
orion.notes: Large-scale mining. S2 laser. Details TBD.

loadouts._note: Community-recommended setups. Mass values = max rock mass the setup can crack.

easy.label: Helix I + 2x Rieger-C3
easy.notes: Newbie setup. Reliable for most rocks.

medium.label: Helix I + Rieger-C3 + Focus III
medium.notes: Safer window with power. Good balance.

hard.label: Helix I + Rieger-C3 + Surge
hard.notes: Experienced. Surge for burst power on bigger rocks. Limited uses.

medium.label: Golem + 2x Rieger-C3
medium.notes: Best passive setup. Still limited by bespoke laser.

hard.label: Golem + 2x Rieger-C3 + Sabir gadget
hard.notes: Sabir -50% resistance compensates bespoke laser limitations.

easy.label: Solo MOLE — use Center turret for most rocks
easy.notes: 3 turrets pre-configured. Center for 20k-29k. Swap to Left (fire actives) for 30k-40k. Right for small rocks & extraction.

medium.label: Solo MOLE — swap to Left turret for harder rocks
medium.notes: Same 3 turrets. Use Left turret with Stampede+Surge for 30k-40k rocks. Center for easier ones. Right for fragments.

hard.label: Solo MOLE — Sabir gadget + Left turret actives
hard.notes: Throw Sabir at rock first (-50% resist), then swap to Left turret with actives. 1 gadget per rock when solo.

easy.label: 2-crew MOLE — 2 primaries stacking
easy.notes: Both operators fire at same rock — power stacks. 3rd turret preset for fragments.

medium.label: 2-crew MOLE — both with actives
medium.notes: Active modules from both turrets stack.

hard.label: 2-crew MOLE — actives + Sabir
hard.notes: One operator throws Sabir, both fire.

easy.label: 3-crew MOLE — all 3 stacking
easy.notes: All 3 fire at same rock when needed. Turret 3 switches to fragments after crack.

medium.label: 3-crew MOLE — all with actives
medium.notes: Active modules from all turrets stack.

hard.label: 3-crew MOLE — full loadout + Sabir
hard.notes: One operator throws Sabir, all 3 fire. Maximum MOLE.

gadget_rules.notes: Gadgets are thrown at rocks. Infinite uses, reusable. Only 1 gadget per rock at a time (unless multiple players throw simultaneously). Do not work on FPS hand-mining rocks.

module_rules.notes: Passive modules always active. Active modules have timer + limited uses. Cannot equip 2 of same active type. When multiple MOLE turrets fire at same rock, all modifiers stack.
